meta.description: Professional Bolt Torque guide with ASME B18.2.1 formulas, technical tables, and design checklists.

seo.h1: Bolt Torque Calculator & Engineering Guide - AluCalc
seo.intro: Determines the required torque to produce a specific clamp force while overcoming friction.
seo.step_by_step:
1. Define system parameters for Bolt Torque.
2. Consult the technical reference table for material constants.
3. Apply the ASME B18.2.1 formula.
4. Run the post-calculation design checks.
seo.practical: In Fasteners applications, accurate Bolt Torque analysis is vital for safety and performance.
